character.notes: Bith Gadgeteer Engineer built for a level 5 Clone Wars Republic mission. Species traits: speed 30, Detail Oriented, Keen Hearing and Smell, Musician, Programmer. Languages: Galactic Basic, Bith, binary/droid-oriented mission language by GM approval. Saving throws: Constitution and Intelligence. Skills: Investigation, Technology, Piloting, Lore, Medicine. Technology is marked expertise for app simplicity; if your GM wants Bith Programmer to apply only to computer-related Technology checks, set technology.expertise to false and use the Computer Slicing custom roll instead. Engineer 5 core values: 12 tech powers known, 10 base tech points, max power level 3rd, Potent Aptitude d6, 5 modification slots. Nim is using 4 harness modifications, one over proficiency bonus, so tech point max is entered as 15 for this table. Harness modifications assumed: Integrated Inhibitor, Sentry Turret, Oil Spill, Shocking Barrier. Tech powers known: Ion Blast, Mending, On/Off, Analyze, Energy Shield, Kolto Pack, Smoke Cloud, Tactical Barrier, Repair Droid, Hold Droid, Lock, Invisibility to Cameras, Scramble Interface. Combat gear: infused fiber armor, light shield generator, light pistol, vibrodagger, wristpad, tinker's implements, slicer's kit, gadgeteer's implements, and Gadgeteer Harness. Personality: precise, over-formal, nasal technical specialist who protects allies with barriers, complains politely about unsafe equipment, and treats droid warfare as an engineering hygiene problem. Inventory update: spent 4,995 of 5,000 credits on infused fiber armor, light shield generator, security kit, pocket scrambler, holotrace device, comm jammer, repair kit, 2 medpacs, traumakit, and 12 additional power cells. Combat AC is now 16 from infused fiber armor plus light shield generator. Power cell resource is 14 total including 2 starting cells. Basic inventory update: added Engineer starting gear, Scientist background gear, Gadgeteer-specific tools, dungeoneer's pack contents, and Nim's visual/personal gear: magnifying monocular, tiny-tool bandolier, bright pink insulated gloves, Aurebesh warning tags, diagnostic probes, blank datacards, spare parts, dust wraps, and Republic contractor badge. Resource-depletion update: actions and inventory items now use depletes/depletionOptions hooks. The light pistol contains a loaded power cell tracked as an item-contained resource; spare power cells are tracked separately. Cybernetic update: Dexterity Enhancement (Basic) purchased for 200 cr; Dex is now 16 and Cha is now 9 due to the side effect. AC is now 17 with infused fiber armor plus light shield generator.
